# DeltaDocs

> Crawl a documentation site into clean, chunked, hash-stamped, LLM-ready output, and emit only what changed between runs (a ChangeSet of added/modified/removed chunks). v1 one-shot extractor + v2 delta engine. SHA-256 over normalized text is the diff key.

## Docs
- [README](README.md): overview, install, CLI + Apify quickstart, ChangeSet schema, tests
- [Launch post](LAUNCH.md): short announcement and positioning

## Core modules
- [schema.py](src/deltadocs/schema.py): PageRecord / ChunkRecord / RawPage (v1) + ChangeSet (v2)
- [crawler.py](src/deltadocs/crawler.py): in-domain crawl (sitemap + links, robots.txt, globs, depth)
- [extract.py](src/deltadocs/extract.py): main-content extraction to markdown + normalization + hashing
- [chunk.py](src/deltadocs/chunk.py): heading-aware chunking + per-chunk hashing
- [diff.py](src/deltadocs/diff.py): v2 delta engine (added/modified/removed) + state persistence
- [deliver.py](src/deltadocs/deliver.py): v3 vector-DB push (Chroma) + webhook/Slack alerts
- [enrich.py](src/deltadocs/enrich.py): v3 per-change LLM summary + tags (provider-agnostic)
- [mcp_server.py](src/deltadocs/mcp_server.py): v3 MCP server exposing crawl_docs / diff_docs
- [pipeline.py](src/deltadocs/pipeline.py): crawl->extract->chunk and llms.txt / llms-full.txt builders
- [cli.py](src/deltadocs/cli.py): OSS CLI (one-shot + --state-dir change tracking)
- [main.py](src/deltadocs/main.py): Apify Actor entry (KV-store state, changed-chunk output + pricing)

## Acceptance
- [run_real_sites.py](scripts/run_real_sites.py): 10-real-sites >=90% non-empty-markdown harness
- [tests](tests): contract, crawler, extractor, chunker, pipeline, §8 acceptance, and v2 golden-file diff

## Store listing (SEO — set in the Apify Actor settings)
- seoTitle: "DeltaDocs — Change-Tracked, LLM-Ready Docs Chunks (+ llms.txt)"
- seoDescription: "Crawl any docs site into clean, heading-aware, hash-stamped chunks and emit only what changed between runs — cheap, change-only RAG re-indexing. OSS + Apify Actor."
